It turns out that Hong Yi already found out that Ke Yan isn't his grandson, but he is still grateful to Huo Chang.

Yi Cheng eavesdrops on their chat and realises the incidents at Xiang Dang Dang are done by Zhang Shu under Qing Feng's instructions. She confronts Qing Feng, who admits and says Ke Yan is part of it and had purposely approached her to gain her trust. Yi Cheng feels betrayed and cut ties with him.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 9
programme.desc: Figures show that an estimated 2,000 to 3,000 people suffer from rare disorders in Singapore, of whom 700 are children. The Frontline team visits three families in Singapore whose children suffer from Wilson disease, Prader-Willi syndrome and campomelic dysplasia respectively. How do they confront the daily challenges head-on? What impact do such disorders have on the lives of patients and their families?

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 3
programme.desc: Asri wants to reward Kak Sal and Kak Cik for helping him with Raja Bundle's promo video. Hani is hurt when she mistakenly thinks Asri takes her shopping to reward her. Hani feels it is time to move on. Raja Bundle's business begins to bloom, causing the envious Madi Lambung to collaborate with other HBB sellers and try to sway Asri's customers. Asri is devastated when one of his HBB sellers betrays him and abandons Raja Bundle after Asri confirms a big order.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 4
programme.desc: Ema joins Raja Bundle and manages to boost sales for Asri. In return, Asri helps Ema to care for her son, Omar, who is recovering. Hani starts dating again. Amirul and Asri's relationship strains further after Asri jumps to conclusion and accuses Amirul of being a school bully. Asri announces the opening of Raja Bundle's cloud kitchen, much to the delight of his HBB sellers. When Asri bumps into Madi Lambung, he is shocked by the latter's hostility towards him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 5

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 6

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 7

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 8

programme.title: Si Manis Jembatan Perasaan Aku dan Kamu
programme.desc: In need of money, Syafira (Rachquel Nesia) takes a unique job in Yogyakarta as a 'Kuntilanak' cosplayer to scare young couples at the beach. During her shift, she accidentally crashes into a visitor named El (Fendy Chow). El is terrified when Syafira’s wig ends up on his head, and even more shocked when she deadpans that it’s 'ghost hair

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 208
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Idolanya Kaum Mendang Mending Jangan Ya Dek Ya!!
programme.desc: Dadang (Jeff Smith) is so obsessed with dangdut singer Jenita Janet that he neglects his work, infuriating his mother. He hitches a ride on a truck to Jakarta to meet his idol, unaware that a local girl named Lilis (Raisya Bawazier) has sneaked along to see the National Monument (Monas). Lilis’s presence turns Dadang’s simple mission into a chaotic disaster.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 10
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 156
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Makan Seblak Pake Nangka, Meski Galak Aku Tetap Suka
programme.desc: Naya has always been a loyal fan of an artist named Rama. She spends hours watching his movies and following his latest news on social media. She has no idea that their paths will cross in the most unexpected way. One sunny day, while Naya was busy selling goods, Rama accidentally bumped into her cart. Stunned and surprised, Naya couldn't believe her eyes. The person she admired was standing right in front of her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 208
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Undian Memang Salah Tapi Hasilnya Kita Berjodoh
programme.desc: Determined to avoid her wedding with Bimo, Julia flees her home on a trail bike. She enlists her best friend, Iis, to help stage her disappearance. A desperate Bimo chases her in a pickup truck, shouting for her to stop as Julia races toward her freedom.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 10
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: AKSOBHNYA
programme.desc: A desperate archeologist becomes obsessed with selling a priceless ancient statue on the black market to fund her life-saving treatment for uterine cancer.

programme.title: Dek Jamu Kuat Cintaku Syenggol Dong

programme.title: RAKET PENYABET JODOH
programme.desc: Maya (Michelle Ziudith) is in a rush and gets into a fight with Miko (Lucky Perdana) over an ojek. She later discovers that Miko is her new badminton coach. Miko underestimates Maya’s skills, demoting her to the bench and claiming she isn't ready for the main team, sparking a fiery determination in Maya to prove him wrong.

programme.title: BABANG JEMPUTNYA SATU CINTANYA BANYAK
programme.desc: Marni (Enzy Storia) is furious when her charge switches to a new school shuttle driven by Bagyo (Dimaz Andrean). programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 5
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 5

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 1
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 4
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 4

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong ? - EP 1

programme.title: Karok La Kau! - EP 11

programme.title: Shakti - The Power

The motive appears to be linked to the lucrative contract she signed with a sponsor. Investigators Romain Fabiot and Camille Lauristan are assisted by Vincent Beti, a former player with a troubled past.

programme.title: Les Patins

programme.title: Un Apres-Midi a Se Fesser Dessus

Here, the disability of some is seen as a source of richness for the collective. In France, nearly 50,000 children with disabilities could not be accommodated at the start of the 2025 school year, despite laws and commitments...

programme.title: Yetili - EP 48

programme.title: Fara - EP 12
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 40
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 2
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 5
programme.desc: Frog has to learn to accept his physique, so different from the other weightlifters, to win the competition.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 2
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 47
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 28
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 38
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 24
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Fille De Paysan
programme.desc: The Pecourneaus are a close-knit farming family, determined, despite the accumulating debts, to save their farm. A series of unfortunate events plus a new European regulation combine to make their situation untenable. Their daughter emilie decides to publicise their story, to rally as many people as possible to their cause.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie - EP 8
programme.desc: Between Suriname and Brazil, French Guiana is the only French overseas department in South America, where nature and cultural diversity unfold just a few degrees from the equator. The adventure begins by pirogue on the Maroni River, discovering traditional Bushinengue villages. Papaichton, Belikampo, Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni, whose history remains marked by the penal colony. Javouhey, founded by Hmong refugees in the 1970s, the colorful town of Mana, then Kourou and its space center.

programme.title: Green - EP 1
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

programme.title: Movie - Etharkkum Thunithavan
programme.desc: Fearless lawyer Kannabiran's investigation into the mysterious deaths of young women leads him to a criminal mastermind Inba, who heads a web that exploits and extorts gullible women to seek favours from powerful men. Can Kannabiran avenge their deaths?

programme.title: Movie - Acham Enbathu Madamayada
programme.desc: Rajinikanth and Leela, a young couple, embark on a road trip. However, little do they know that unfortunate instances are going to put their lives at stake.

programme.title: Movie - Marumagale Vaazhga
programme.desc: Gopi and his brother Satyam both get married, but Gopi's wife is not treated well in the family. Lakshmi, Satyam's wife, realises the same and tries to teach her mother-in-law a lesson.

programme.title: Movie - Marupadiyum Oru Kadhal
programme.desc: Jeeva and Mahi fall in love with each other without meeting. Subsequently, the two are forced to get married. However, they fail to realise that they're actually married to the person they love.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vanakkamda Mapplae
programme.desc: Mariner Aravind enjoys a happy-go-lucky life with six months at sea and six months on land. He falls in love with Thulasi, who doesn't reciprocate his love. Eventually love blossoms between them, but trouble begins when Aravind's mistake from the past catches up with him.

programme.title: Movie - Kuthu
programme.desc: Veerabhagu, a powerful don, disapproves of his daughter Anjali's relationship with Guru. He tries several ways to keep them away from each other.

programme.title: Movie - Kaththi Sandai
programme.desc: Arjun plays modern-day Robin Hood when he steals money from two corrupt government officials and uses it to develop the remote village he hails from.

programme.title: Movie - Thiruda Thirudi
programme.desc: Vasu, a prankster, whiles away his time teasing girls and getting scolded by his father. But when one of his pranks results in his brother getting jailed, he decides to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Movie - Soorarai Pottru
programme.desc: Maara, a young man from a remote village, dreams of launching his own airline service. However, he must overcome several obstacles and challenges in order to be successful in his quest.

programme.title: Movie - Rowthiram
programme.desc: Shiva holds great respect for his grandfather who taught him to fight against oppression. His parents, on the other hand, are peace-loving people. Soon, Shiva fights against some dangerous goons.

programme.title: Movie - Marutha Velu
programme.desc: Marudhavelu, an action movie, is directed by R.K.R Adhimoolam and produced by S.Sanmuga Pandiyan. The film stars Kailash, Natchathira and Akansha, with James Vasanthan as Music director.

programme.title: Movie - Mathikettan Saalai
programme.desc: The bond between four friends is put to the test when one of them betrays the others due to unavoidable circumstances.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Suyetchai M.L.A
programme.desc: A poor man works for an MLA for his election campaigns, and his sister wants to marry a rich boy. The rich boy's father insults him because of his poverty, challenging him to become a rich man so he will get his daughter married to him.

programme.title: Movie - Nepaali
programme.desc: Karthik's wife Priya is being harassed by a police officer and as a result she ends her life. However, Karthik is held responsible for her death and imprisoned. While in prison, a social worker offers to help him and clear his name.

programme.title: Movie - Andha 7 Naatkal
programme.desc: When Vasanthi's husband, Dr Anand, learns that she was forcefully married to him, he decides to reunite her with her lover. However, Vasanthi soon falls for him and accepts him as her husband.

programme.title: Movie - Samundi
programme.desc: Samundi and his mother move into a nearby hamlet to live peacefully. Terror strikes them once again through the local goon, who spoiled his sister's life. Will he now exact retribution for the past?

programme.title: Movie - Citizen
programme.desc: Abdulla, a mechanic, kidnaps three prominent government officials. Sarojini is a CBI officer who investigates this matter and tries to piece together the clues left behind by the kidnapper.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Review Show

programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 24/25 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW38 Burnley v Wolverhampton Wanderers
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 38
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 18 AUG
programme.desc: Review bursts into life with Matchweek 1 of the 2025/26 Premier League with a blockbuster Sunday showdown as Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford. Chelsea face an immediate test against Crystal Palace, Wolves welcome Manchester City to Molinuex, and Liverpool kick-off their title defence against Bournemouth.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 25
programme.desc: Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. He opens up about his decision to leave Tottenham for their fiercest rivals, Arsenal, the intense pressure of returning to White Hart Lane that first season, and how he's dealt with the fallout ever since. A fascinating insight into the 'move that shook North London'.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester City (MW03) - EP 28
programme.desc: Between 2017-18 and 2023-24, Brighton and Hove Albion only avoided defeat in two of 14 Premier League games against Man City (W1 D1 L12); last season, they didn’t lose against City, winning 2-1 at home and drawing 2-2 at the Etihad.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Liverpool (MW06) - EP 53
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 16 Premier League meetings with Liverpool (D3 L12), winning 1-0 at Anfield in April 2024. The Eagles haven’t scored more than once in any of their last 12 league games against the Reds (6 goals).

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Manchester City (MW09) - EP 88
programme.desc: Aston Villa have won their last two home league games against Manchester City, last winning more consecutively between 1960 and 1975 (5).

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Arsenal (MW06) - EP 59
programme.desc: Newcastle have kept four clean sheets in their five Premier League games this season, conceding only in their 3-2 defeat to Liverpool. However, the Magpies have also failed to score in three of their five league games so far.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Arsenal (MW03) - EP 30
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in six Premier League matches against Arsenal (D4 L2), their longest winless run against the Gunners since going eight without a win between October 2007 and April 2011.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Manchester United (MW04) - EP 40
programme.desc: Manchester City have won five of their last eight Premier League matches against Manchester United (D1 L2), though they failed to win either game (D1 L1) last season for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Manchester City (MW05) - EP 50
programme.desc: Arsenal have won two of their last four league meetings with Manchester City (D2), as many as their previous 22 beforehand (D5 L15). The Gunners could win back-to-back league games against the Citizens for the first time since December 2015.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Manchester United (MW08) - EP 79
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last eight Premier League away games (D2 L6) since beating Leicester City 3-0 in March. The Red Devils last went longer without a league win on the road in September 1989 under Alex Ferguson (11).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace (MW09) - EP 86
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League meetings with Crystal Palace, though the exception was a 2-2 draw in this exact fixture last season.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Nottingham Forest (MW12) - EP 115
programme.desc: Liverpool lost this exact fixture 1-0 last season, the only league game in which they failed to score all season. They’ve not lost consecutive home league games against Nottingham Forest since 1963.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW12) - EP 119
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League games against Tottenham (D1), including the last three in a row. It’s their longest winning run against Spurs since a five game stretch between January 1987 and January 1989.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Liverpool (MW11) - EP 110
programme.desc: Liverpool won this exact fixture 2-0 last season but haven’t won consecutive away league games against Man City since a run of three between 1987 and 1991.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester City (MW03) - EP 28
programme.desc: Between 2017-18 and 2023-24, Brighton and Hove Albion only avoided defeat in two of 14 Premier League games against Man City (W1 D1 L12); last season, they didn’t lose against City, winning 2-1 at home and drawing 2-2 at the Etihad.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features part 2 of all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season two showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Berto vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undeafeated Andre Berto (25-0, 19 KOs) in his 4th defense of the WBC Welterweight Title as he takes on former WBO Champion Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (27-2, 21 KOs) at the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA on April 10, 2010.

programme.title: WCCB Live Roman Fress vs. Armend Xhoxhaj II (Live)
programme.desc: LIVE May 30th from Magdeburg, Germany, 23-1 and #1 world ranked Cruiserweight (WBO) Roman Fress fights in front of his home fans, taking on top-10 ranked Armend Xhoxhaj in a rematch of their 2022 clash. In their first meeting, Xhoxhaj outpointed Fress by a narrow split decision, handing Fress the first and only defeat of his career. Now the two meet again in Magdeburg, this time with the WBO European and WBO Intercontinental Cruiserweight Championship on the line. Don't miss Fress vs.

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Abu Dhabi Grand Slam on world Judo day, we speak to double world champion Mayra Aguiar about the unity of the Brazilian judo team, and watch as two world champions battle for gold in the -57kg division.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Adonis Stevenson vs. Jesus Gonzales
programme.desc: This episode features a super middleweight brawl between top contenders Adonis Stevenson and Jesus Gonzales that includes a Knockout of the Year candidate, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 features Hakuho, Endo, Okinoumi and Yutakayamai from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium, in Osaka, Japan.

programme.desc: It's Teletubby Circus time! Tinky Winky balances on the tight rope, Dipsy juggles, Laa­Laa flies on the trapeze and Po is a funny clown.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: We see lots of stars - a yellow star, a bright star, a pointy star and a jingle star. We see Dee and a friend sprinkle stars and Dee wishes on a shooting star! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: Mayor Oki wants to dress to impress the visiting mayor by wearing a gemstone-encrusted chain. He needs Messy's help to work out how to make gemstones before she arrives.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Preston left an egg sandwich out for too long, and now its explosive smell is stinking up the whole town. Mojo and Bo need to evacuate everyone in Swoppiton before the eggy 'stinkplosion'!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels have different ideas about what makes a good party. But the Squirrels have lots of ideas about what happens when the clock strikes twelve. Are they right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch creates trouble with a little pyramid when he and the Go Jetters visit the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: While Mum and Dad struggle to build new flat-pack furniture, Bluey and Bingo transform the empty boxes into their own new world.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Jen is preparing a holographic display on hard-to-spot animals and desperately needs a scan of a naked mole rat, but can't track down the one living at Safari World. To the rescue comes Andy, who jets off in his safari-mobile, heading to the Sahara desert, in search of this strange-looking creature. His mission takes him into its underground burrow.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday! The squirrels decide they should have a party, but they will have to keep it a secret as it's a very BIG surprise. Now what do you need for a party? Balloons, Decorations, Invitations! Will the squirrels be able to plan the party of the year whilst keeping it a secret...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 46
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins and they have come to visit! But it turns out they are even naughtier than Naughty Monkey! Naughty Monkey goes to the clubhouse to find Duggee and the squirrels for help- will they be able to show those cheeky cousins how to play calmly?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: After hearing about how the Monument to the Equator in Ciudad Mitad del Mundo is in the wrong location, Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters and move the monument onto the equator.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Glitch and Kyan race to the south pole, Glitch's loyal Grimbots steal the pole's marker to help Glitch win.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 20
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to dress up as a monkey for a special event at the Animal Park, but all the other engines laugh at him. Luckily, Rebecca is on hand to offer some useful advice.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Umbrella needs Sarah and Duck's help after he promises to put on a magic show.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Flamingo arrange a nautical surprise for John's birthday.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Stanley must deliver some parcels on the train but ends up delivering the wrong ones. After correcting his mistake, he has to muster the townsfolk to help stop his runaway train.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Stanley must track down the missing library book, 'The Little Book of New Things to Do'. He visits various townsfolk who have leant the book to each other.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Invisibility, speed, electricity, and flight, the animals share all the exciting things they would do if they had magic powers.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: JoJo discovers that Gran Gran used to be in a band and decides that she wants to learn to play the drums. Gran Gran teaches JoJo how to play a beat, and eventually they form a new band!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of 'fluffing' in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: Ubercorn, Foz and Xuli help NASA test their Mars Rover in the Atacama Desert - the oldest and driest desert in the world, scientists think is like Mars itself! The rover is looking for tiny microbes hidden in the dry soil - if it can find them here, it may be able to find them on Mars too. Meanwhile, Glitch and Tala have dressed Grim HQ up as a flying saucer to take tourists to Mars. But after losing control, they end up crash-landing in the Atacama.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 16
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's love and peace symbol, Lychee, performing his song - "All You Need is Lychee!"

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 21
programme.desc: Carrot is excited to show the Tato Team her new inventions, including an improved Robotato, who will help them protect the supermarket from Evil Pea. Unfortunately, Robotato still has a few glitches, so the veggies decide to test Carrot's new jetpacks instead, but Evil Pea sneaks in and commands Robotato to protect her. When Robotato continues to glitch, he becomes overly protective of Evil Pea and takes her to the top of Tato Tower to keep her safe.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 22
programme.desc: All the fruit and veggies in the supermarket are enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, but Evil Pea is determined to ruin it. After Supertato inadvertently stops her from taking the friendship cards and launching attacks with her pea shooter and freezy hose, Evil Pea tries to cover the party in ice cream. But when her plan goes wrong, she's rolled away on the ice cream tub, and Supertato saves her.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 116
programme.desc: It's Teletubby Circus time! Tinky Winky balances on the tight rope, Dipsy juggles, Laa­Laa flies on the trapeze and Po is a funny clown.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: We see lots of stars - a yellow star, a bright star, a pointy star and a jingle star. We see Dee and a friend sprinkle stars and Dee wishes on a shooting star! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: Mayor Oki wants to dress to impress the visiting mayor by wearing a gemstone-encrusted chain. He needs Messy's help to work out how to make gemstones before she arrives.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Preston left an egg sandwich out for too long, and now its explosive smell is stinking up the whole town. Mojo and Bo need to evacuate everyone in Swoppiton before the eggy 'stinkplosion'!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels have different ideas about what makes a good party. But the Squirrels have lots of ideas about what happens when the clock strikes twelve. Are they right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch creates trouble with a little pyramid when he and the Go Jetters visit the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: While Mum and Dad struggle to build new flat-pack furniture, Bluey and Bingo transform the empty boxes into their own new world.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Jen is preparing a holographic display on hard-to-spot animals and desperately needs a scan of a naked mole rat, but can't track down the one living at Safari World. To the rescue comes Andy, who jets off in his safari-mobile, heading to the Sahara desert, in search of this strange-looking creature. His mission takes him into its underground burrow.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday! The squirrels decide they should have a party, but they will have to keep it a secret as it's a very BIG surprise. Now what do you need for a party? Balloons, Decorations, Invitations! Will the squirrels be able to plan the party of the year whilst keeping it a secret...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 46
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins and they have come to visit! But it turns out they are even naughtier than Naughty Monkey! Naughty Monkey goes to the clubhouse to find Duggee and the squirrels for help- will they be able to show those cheeky cousins how to play calmly?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: After hearing about how the Monument to the Equator in Ciudad Mitad del Mundo is in the wrong location, Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters and move the monument onto the equator.

Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3

programme.desc: In the 1970s, the board game industry is aimed almost entirely at children, until a literal game changer comes along in Trivial Pursuit. Redefining the possibilities for adult fun.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 46
programme.desc: A Milwaukee company experiments with something new. What starts as an unappealing low-calorie beer becomes the number one beer in America, sparking a battle between two titans for the crown of light beer.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Quest For The Priestess' Cloak - EP 3
programme.desc: Jaime makes way to the Philippines' Queen City of Cebu, where she conquers its roaring canyons, calms her nerves with some pythons, and harnesses her fighting skills in the country's first battleground.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Det. Nick Davis investigates a homicide in the French Quarter after an innocent bystander is shot and killed. With minimal evidence at the crime scene, Det. Davis tracks a car seen fleeing Bourbon Street.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 123
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot, and when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S4) - EP 1
programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.title: The First 48 (S25) - EP 501
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a beloved special education teacher is gunned down in broad daylight when the suspects' plan to score some easy money spins out of control.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 4
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 1
programme.desc: Tim suffers from feelings of abandonment and hoarding cars and parts is how he copes. Shortly after Tim and DeeDee married, they lost their home in a fire. After moving to a new home, Tim's hoarding began.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 2
programme.desc: Once they moved into their new home, Tim's hoarding began and continued for years. Now, DeeDee refuses to return home to the mess, and they face the possibility of divorce if he doesn't clean up his hoard.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 8
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 1
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 1
programme.desc: Folks in Anchorage, Alaska, are shaken to their core when a popular barista goes missing from the town's favourite coffee shop.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Delve deep into the brutal world of kidnappings in the Philippines. Taken by criminals and terrorists, some victims pay ransoms. Others make daring escapes. Some don't make it home alive.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Cambodia's forests are being cleared by illegal logging cartels, leaving behind barren land and desperate villagers. Now villagers are fighting back, but the cartels are prepared to kill.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 8
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: A distress call in a quiet English village leads police to a volatile Tinder romance, where a man's escalating jealousy puts a young mother and her child in grave danger.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 1
programme.desc: A suspect loses his cool in the interrogation room; a man with a shocking gunshot wound leaves police with more questions than answers; a game of hide and seek turns deadly; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 2
programme.desc: A model is questioned about a deadly encounter with her boyfriend; a man makes a cold-blooded confession; a person of interest says too much; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 3
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 2
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15) - EP 8
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: During a routine undercover prostitution sting, Columbus Vice Detective Andrew Mitchell shoots and kills 23-year-old Donna Dalton Castleberry.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 1

programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner-who was standing nearby-is accused.

programme.desc: In Salzburg, Sue becomes a yodelling YouTuber and does yoga with alpacas. In Vienna, she waltzes, goes hot rod racing and has the fattiest dumplings in the world.

programme.desc: Ben travels to Thailand to meet Paul and Sao, who he first visited in Cambodia. Paul and his family have build their version of an English castle.

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: In northern Asia, life defies hostile extremes. In Russia's Lake Baikal, a seal pup must take evasive action when its ice den starts to melt. Hokkaido's thermal springs are a haven for dancing red-crowned cranes. On the Tibetan Plateau, a lone Himalayan wolf hunts antelope. Fish owls thrive in the forests where Russia and China meet. On the Kamchatka Peninsula, brown bears hunt salmon to prepare for hibernation.

programme.title: Food Factory S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: Visit the historic Michigan home of Alphabits cereal; the secret to a jet-black fettuccine is 3 litres of squid ink; every jar of a zesty garden mix is artfully packed by hand; and much more.

programme.title: Food Factory S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: Once discontinued, the strawberry cheesecake frozen treat is back by popular demand; find out the secret to irresistible sea salt caramels; plus much more.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the far south west of Japan, there is a chain of islands stretching towards the tropics - a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with. The journey begins at an island at the top of the chain and travels south, revealing unexpected stories of isolation, unique wildlife and unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in southern Africa. Covering half a million square miles of desert and scrubland, it's one of the last great unspoiled African wildernesses, sitting on top of a vast basin of sand that in places reaches up to a mile in depth. Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the region's indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Trailblazers: A Rocky Mountain Road Trip S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: The trio are inspired to step out of their own comfort zone as they prepare to emulate Isabella's most impressive feat - summitting a 14,000ft mountain. They also meet the African-American sisters blazing a trail through the male-dominated world of rodeo, howl with wolves at a wildlife sanctuary, and visit the spiritual and religious centres clustered around the Sangre de Cristo Mountains.

programme.title: Inside the Factory S10 - EP 3
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness tours a lawnmower factory. Ruth Goodman shows the history of how stately homes adopted the lawn, and Cherry Healey visits Wembley Stadium to see how professional turf is trimmed.

programme.desc: Duncan talks Ant into buying a 1991 BMW 30 325i, convinced there's profit to be made. Meanwhile, Ant races to finish the hallway of the farmhouse.

programme.title: 6000-LB. Shark

programme.desc: Up in Bonnie Scotland, Zuu and AJ head to the luxury 'old money' estates of the rich and high society. programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 2
programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Giles Coren visit Reid's Palace on Madeira, which first welcomed the world's glamorous elite 130 years ago and is working to keep its silver service traditions alive in the modern world. Giles irons bedspreads in a suite once loved by Winston Churchill, and Monica cleans crabs out of the historic tidal swimming pool. Madeiran food is celebrated with line-fished tuna and fruity ice cream treats called lambayecas for the sunbathers.

programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 8
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 29

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: A trip to Australia with the closest friends: there's a large paddleboard that five people can ride together. After a fun time on the paddleboard, Genius Jang comes up with a game idea, as usual...

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and "dirty pasta".

programme.title: Living with My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 13
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sauteed sweet onions, jalapeno peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 14
programme.desc: Rachael teaches how to prepare rabbit ragu, a traditional Tuscan recipe that combines ground rabbit, vegetables, wine and more to make a thick sauce served over long pasta.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 78

programme.title: Got To Leave Something - EP 3
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world. Broadcast from CGTN’s production center in the Kenyan capital, Nairobi, Talk Africa looks at Africa and the world from an African perspective.

programme.title: Sports Scene

BS Special "Beyond the Deep River, the Magpie Bridge"

programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news from Tokyo.

programme.title: Information Worth Knowing from the News Commentator Bureau
programme.desc: The commentators present trending news, its background, and engaging information related to daily life in an easy-to -understand manner.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 109
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 46 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: Fun with Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. programme.title: Cooking Beauties
programme.desc: Edwin Siu, Bob Lam and Owen Cheung host the third season of Cooking Beauties! A group of female celebrities must prepare a designated dish, maintaining an air of mystery while the male guests try to guess the beauties' identities.

programme.title: 2026 Mid-Year Sales Presentation
programme.desc: 'Looking ahead to the second half of 2026, TVB will continue its commitment to breaking through traditional television frameworks, integrating AI technology into program production, and creating a diversified new-generation media platform to present viewers with a brand-new entertainment experience that is "more than just television.

Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 26
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. But Yeung-tin is not listening. While drowning his sorrows alone, Hok-yin runs into Ko Ching, who has come to recover car repair costs. Hok-yin wrongly thinks she is his late mother.

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 12
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin and Wun-chau’s past is exposed. Wun-chau offers some explanation to Lam Ching, and the duo resolve their misunderstanding. Hok-kan pays Lam Ching’s father Lam Tat-kuen a visit and expresses goodwill to him. But he accidentally finds out Tat-kuen has no knowledge of the marriage.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 895
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 9
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 13
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 16
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 17
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 39
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 40
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 10
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 14
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 18
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.
